title: 5x SDS (10 mL) Preparation
author: Haven Himmighoefer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kuycwxw

steps.title: Combine Tris, Glycerol, and DTT
steps.instruction: In a 15 mL falcon tube, combine 1.667 mL of pH 6.8 Tris, 3 mL of 100% glycerol, and 5 mL of DTT.

steps.title: Add and Dissolve SDS
steps.instruction: Once mixed, in the fume hood, add 1 g of SDS. Shake until SDS in completely in solution (this takes a while!).

steps.title: Adjust Volume with Water
steps.instruction: If under 10 mL, fill with water to 10 mL mark.

steps.title: Aliquot and Store
steps.instruction: Distribute 1 mL aliquots in Eppendorf tubes and store on the bottom shelf of the fridge.
